title: Sap's Wacky Pearls
description: Adds 4 new and unique pearls to the game!
body:
This mod adds 4 new types of pearls:

![Showcase of the four pearls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b1a92e4505abef113163c4d8a992cf9637e568d.png)

### The Lover's pearl:
Teleports the person bound to it, there is no max distance


### The phantom pearl:

Goes through blocks according to the number of sacrificed phantom membrane, it phases through a maximum of 8 blocks


### The redstone pearl:

It sticks on any surface including entities. It converts 1 restone used to 1 second stuck. the maximum of time a restone pearl can stick to something is an hour.


### The Slime pearl:

It bounces off walls/floors/ceilings, bounces differ by the amount of slimeballs used. It can bounce a maximum of 8 times.
 


### Usage

For the last 3 pearls, you can craft them by  combining a pearl and it's respective ingredient in a crafting table. The lover's pearl differs as it needs 2 ender pearls and 1 lapis to be crafted.

To boost a pearl, you must hold the ingredient in your offhand, sneak and then right click. The amount of ingredient in your offhand, is what is added. Each pearl has it's own limit defined in their sections on here.
 

If you have difficulties with the mod you can contact me on discord (saperate) or simply open an issue on github detailing the problem.



### Version: 1.19.2
The pearls available to this version are the slime, phantom and redstone pearls. To boost their respective abilities, add more of the pearl's ingredient in the crafting table
